节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Size info. Returns the width and height of the component. The default unit is vp, but APIs that use the Size type may specify a different unit, in which case the unit specified by the API takes precedence.
Get the width of the Size. Unit: vp. Value range: [0, +∞).
Get the height of the Size. Unit: vp. Value range: [0, +∞).
Defines DrawContext. Graphics drawing context, which provides the canvas width and height required for drawing.
Get size of the DrawContext.
注释信息: @returns { Size } The size of the DrawContext.
节点.return_description: The size of the DrawContext.

节点.功能描述: Get size of the DrawContext with pixel unit.
注释信息: @returns { Size } The size of the DrawContext with pixel unit.
节点.return_description: The size of the DrawContext with pixel unit.

节点.功能描述: Get canvas of the DrawContext.
注释信息: @returns { drawing.Canvas } The canvas of the DrawContext.
节点.return_description: The canvas of the DrawContext.

节点.功能描述: Defined a vector with two values.
Value for x-axis of the vector. Value range: (-∞, +∞).
Value for y-axis of the vector. Value range: (-∞, +∞).
Defined a vector with two T type values.
Value for x-axis of the vector.
Value for y-axis of the vector.
Defined a vector with three values.
Value for x-axis of the vector. Value range: (-∞, +∞).
Value for y-axis of the vector. Value range: (-∞, +∞).
Value for z-axis of the vector. Value range: (-∞, +∞).
Frame info, include the position info and size info.
Position value for x-axis of the frame info. Unit: vp. Value range: (-∞, +∞).
Position value for y-axis of the frame info. Unit: vp. Value range: (-∞, +∞).
Size value for width of the frame info. Unit: vp. Value range: [0, +∞).
Size value for height of the frame info. Unit: vp. Value range: [0, +∞).
Defines the Edge property.
Left property.
Right property.
Top property.
Bottom property.
Defines the Length Unit.
Logical pixel used in Ace1.0. It's based on frontend design width. For example, when a frontend with 750px design width running on a device with 1080 pixels width, 1px represents 1.44 pixels.
Density independent pixels, one vp is one pixel on a 160 dpi screen.
Scale independent pixels. This is like VP but will be scaled by user's font size preference.
The percentage of either a value from the element's parent or from another property of the element itself.
Logic pixels used in ACE2.0 instead of PX, and PX is the physical pixels in ACE2.0.
Defines the Size property.
Width property.
Height property.
Enumerates the length metrics unit.
The default length metrics unit, in vp.
The pixel length metrics unit.
Defines the Length Metrics. When the length unit is PERCENT, the value 1 indicates 100%.

Constructor. If the unit parameter is omitted or explicitly set to undefined, the default unit VP is used. If it is set to a value that is not of the LengthUnit type, the default value 0 VP is used. The default value is VP.
注释信息: @param { number } value - The value of length.

parameters.说明: The value of length.
LengthUnit } [unit] - The length unit.

节点.功能描述: Instantiate the ColorMetrics class using color rgb The value is an integer ranging from 0 to 255. The value is an integer ranging from 0 to 255. The value is an integer ranging from 0 to 255. The value is a floating point number ranging from 0.0 to 1.0. The default value is 1.0 (fully opaque).
注释信息: @param { number } red - red value of rgba
@param { number } green - green value of rgba
@param { number } blue - blue value of rgba
@param { number } alpha - opacity value of rgba

green value of rgba
blue value of rgba
opacity value of rgba

节点.return_description: ColorMetrics class

节点.功能描述: Instantiate the ColorMetrics class using colorSpace and rgba. Only some properties support setting color in display-p3 colorSpace.
注释信息: @param { number } red - red value of rgba. The range of the red channel is [0, 1].
@param { number } green - green value of rgba. The range of the green channel is [0, 1].
@param { number } blue - blue value of rgba. The range of the blue channel is [0, 1].
@param { number } [alpha] - alpha value of rgba. The range of the alpha channel is [0, 1]. The default value is 1.

parameters.说明: colorSpace of color.
red value of rgba. The range of the red channel is [0, 1].
green value of rgba. The range of the green channel is [0, 1].
blue value of rgba. The range of the blue channel is [0, 1].
number } [alpha] - alpha value of rgba. The range of the alpha channel is [0, 1]. The default value is 1.

节点.功能描述: It's a 4x4 matrix, represent by number[]. Value range of each number: (-∞, +∞)
Offset info. Unit: vp.
Position info. Unit: vp.
PositionT info. Unit: vp.

Pivot info. As the rotation or scaling center of the component, the pivot affects the rotation and scaling effects. The value is a floating point number in the range [0.0, 1.0], and the default value is 0.5.
Scale info. The value is a floating point number, and the default value is 1.0.
Translation info. Unit: px
Rotation info. Unit: degree
Defines the Corner radius.
BorderRadiuses info.
Rect info.

parameters.说明: The edge color will be set, in ARGB format, for example, 0xffff00ff.
